headline: Tom Lee's Small-Cap Granny Shots ETF Reloads: First Solar, Zoom Among 10 New Buys
summary: Tom Lee's GRNJ added First Solar, Zoom and eight other stocks in its latest rebalance as assets under management climbed to $476 million.

raw.headline: Tom Lee's Small-Cap Granny Shots ETF Reloads: First Solar, Zoom Among 10 New Buys
raw.summary: Tom Lee's GRNJ added First Solar, Zoom and eight other stocks in its latest rebalance as assets under management climbed to $476 million.

headline: Array, Nextpower, and First Solar Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after early gains reversed and a midday helicopter incident introduced a new layer of uncertainty across cyclical sectors. Iran shooting down a US Apache helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz, and Trump's statement that the US must respond, directly unsettled two components of industrial demand.
